description: Fix api() incorrectly throwing ToolError.internal for valid 2xx responses with status codes other than 200 (e.g., 201 Created).
qualityChecks: cd plugins/tiktok && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace response.status === 200 guard with response.ok in api()
userStories.description: In plugins/tiktok/src/tiktok-api.ts, the api() function uses `if (response.status === 200)` to decide whether to parse the response. Since fetchFromPage already throws on non-ok responses, all responses reaching this check are 2xx. However, for 201/202/204 responses, the else branch incorrectly reads the body and throws ToolError.internal('TikTok API error: 201 ...'). Replace the `=== 200` check with handling that processes all 2xx responses correctly (including 204 empty body).
acceptanceCriteria: The response.status === 200 check in api() is removed or replaced
204 No Content responses return an empty object or empty string without error
Non-empty 2xx responses (200, 201, 202) are JSON-parsed and returned
The empty-response detection (text.length === 0) still works for 200 responses with empty bodies
